patches.mechanism: Run generation and forward with use_cache=False until the model code is patched to the new cache API.
patches.mismatch: Legacy remote code calls transformers.cache_utils.DynamicCache.get_max_length, which is absent in modern Transformers.

patches.mechanism: Reject non-callable tokenizer returns and fall back to the slow transformers.LlamaTokenizer.
patches.mismatch: AutoTokenizer or the fast LLaMA tokenizer can return a non-callable false value for the legacy tokenizer config.

patches.mechanism: Read classifier head shape from checkpoint metadata and override config.num_labels, id2label, and label2id before loading.
patches.mismatch: Stale config.num_labels disagrees with classifier.weight first dimension and causes head size mismatch during load.

patches.mechanism: Inject a local shim before loading remote code, then validate in the target env.
patches.mismatch: Remote code imports transformers.modeling_utils.apply_chunking_to_forward, which is not exported by modern Transformers.

patches.mechanism: Provide a local Linear followed by activation fallback for ABot feed-forward paths.
patches.mismatch: ABot imports diffusers.models.activations.LinearActivation, which is absent in the installed Diffusers runtime.

patches.mechanism: Load with torch_dtype=bfloat16, low_cpu_mem_usage=True, use_safetensors=True, and device_map values targeting cuda.
patches.mismatch: Default upstream loading spends minutes in CPU materialization and casting for large safetensors files.

patches.mechanism: Install a runtime torch.distributed._mesh_layout._FlatLayout compatibility class that maps old sizes/strides pickle state onto Torch 2.10 shape/stride layout storage before loading rank-local FSDP2 shards.
patches.mismatch: Legacy FSDP2 shard pickles reference the private Torch _FlatLayout symbol, while Torch 2.10 in ai exposes the compatible class as _MeshLayout.

patches.mechanism: Use string device map values such as cuda:0.
patches.mismatch: Safetensors rejects torch.device('cuda:0') as an invalid device in this environment.

patches.mechanism: Fall back to torch.nn.functional.scaled_dot_product_attention when FlashAttention packages are absent.
patches.mismatch: The model calls flash_attention directly and asserts FlashAttention2 even when PyTorch SDPA is available.

patches.mechanism: Construct tokenizer at startup and keep T5 unloaded until an uncached prompt encode is requested.
patches.mismatch: WanTextEncoder eagerly loads a large T5 checkpoint during pipeline construction.

patches.mechanism: Cache prompt_embeds by prompt, tokenizer, and checkpoint hash; optionally enforce cache-only prompt setup.
patches.mismatch: Live runtime should not repeatedly load or run T5 for fixed prompts.

patches.mechanism: Validate backend availability and write sage_attn2 config values only when supported.
patches.mismatch: Available SageAttention backend names and FP8 support are hardware and install dependent.

patches.mechanism: Wrap only AnyFlowFARPipeline.transformer.forward and pad (sample,) to (sample, None) for return_dict=False.
patches.mismatch: AnyFlowFARPipeline unpacks two return values while transformer forward can return a one-item tuple when return_dict is false.

patches.mechanism: Prefer local .nemo archive restore with ASRModel.restore_from and ignore external Transformers metadata unless restore fails with a Transformers API error.
patches.mismatch: External model metadata advertises Transformers versions that do not match the NeMo archive runtime.

patches.mechanism: Restore archives once in a resident worker/service and route repeated transcribe calls through the warm model.
patches.mismatch: Restoring .nemo archives per request causes unacceptable cold latency and env churn.

patches.mechanism: Run NeMo validation and workers with PYTHONNOUSERSITE=1.
patches.mismatch: User-site packages can mask missing NeMo env packages during validation.

patches.mechanism: Route TRELLIS through the official runtime in an isolated worker boundary.
patches.mismatch: TRELLIS geometry dependencies conflict with other 3D generation stacks in a shared Python process.

patches.mechanism: Map the bridge request to the configured HF cache root before launching the worker.
patches.mismatch: Official TRELLIS runtime resolves weights from Hugging Face cache paths rather than generic local model roots.

patches.mechanism: Normalize worker outputs to a mesh artifact bundle with GLB as the preferred product.
patches.mismatch: Different 3D backends emit incompatible raw artifacts.

patches.mechanism: Use official hy3dgen loader for compatible Hunyuan3D 2.x shape generation paths.
patches.mismatch: LightX2V and official hy3dgen checkpoints use different schemas for some variants.

patches.mechanism: Adapt single-image requests to the mv front-view schema before model invocation.
patches.mismatch: Single-image bridge requests need adaptation to the multiview/front-view schema expected by the mv model.

patches.mechanism: Normalize Hunyuan3D outputs to the shared GLB/mesh artifact bundle.
patches.mismatch: 3D generation outputs need a shared artifact boundary across backends.

patches.mechanism: Route paint assets through a dedicated Hunyuan3D paint postprocess bridge.
patches.mismatch: Paint/PBR assets are postprocess modules, not the base shape-DiT generation path.

patches.mechanism: Route delight assets through a dedicated Hunyuan3D delight postprocess bridge.
patches.mismatch: Delight assets are postprocess modules, not the base shape-DiT generation path.

patches.mechanism: Keep Omni behind a custom runtime boundary until an ai-compatible bridge is validated.
patches.mismatch: Omni assets require a different runtime/control stack from Hunyuan3D 2.x shape-DiT.

patches.mechanism: Launch official Cosmos 2.5 examples through an isolated worker boundary.
patches.mismatch: Official Cosmos 2.5 runtime pins a separate Python/Torch/CUDA extension stack.

patches.mechanism: Pass local checkpoint paths explicitly in bridge launch plans.
patches.mismatch: Official registries may try to resolve or download default checkpoints.

patches.mechanism: Require explicit guardrail enablement and keep local checkpoint validation download-free by default.
patches.mismatch: Guardrail components can introduce extra downloads or runtime dependencies during local validation.

patches.mechanism: Record the official uv cu128 stack as a worker/runtime contract while latest-env consolidation is unproven.
patches.mismatch: Cosmos 2.5 official extras depend on specific cu128 package pins.

patches.mechanism: Patch Cosmos Transfer DMD2 inference before official pipeline construction so the distilled checkpoint builds only the student network.
patches.mismatch: Official distilled Transfer inference still constructs teacher and fake-score networks even though the local checkpoint only contains net.* student tensors.

patches.mechanism: Temporarily move the student net to CPU while computing online text embeddings, then offload the text encoder and restore the student net before denoising.
patches.mismatch: Text encoder CUDA placement can OOM on 24 GiB GPUs when the student DiT remains resident.

patches.mechanism: Route tokenizer CPU/GPU movement through the bridge module-device helper so official wrappers with inner .model.to(...) work.
patches.mismatch: Wan2pt1VAEInterface does not expose a top-level .to(...) method even though its inner model can move devices.

patches.mechanism: Map local checkpoint assets into the MODEL_BASE paths expected by hymm_sp.
patches.mismatch: Upstream runtime expects MODEL_BASE-style paths that differ from local checkpoint layout.

patches.mechanism: Validate and route rank-local shards through an explicit FSDP2 worker contract.
patches.mismatch: Avatar checkpoints include BF16 and FP8 rank-local FSDP shard layouts.

patches.mechanism: Expand the single Hunyuan Avatar LLaVA <image> placeholder to the configured CLIP patch-token count before full generation.
patches.mismatch: Modern Transformers LLaVA validates image token count against image feature count; upstream Hunyuan prompt path produced 1 token while CLIP features are 576.

patches.mechanism: Patch HunyuanVideoPipelineOutput.__getitem__ so non-output distributed ranks return None for index 0 instead of raising when videos=None.
patches.mismatch: Optimized FSDP2 decode is rank-0-only; modern Diffusers BaseOutput drops None fields, causing nonzero ranks to fail after rank 0 writes the artifact.

patches.mechanism: Launch FP8 FSDP2 rank-local transformer shards in ai with native flash-attn, INT8 stage-local LLaVA, cached VAE latents, and bridge output contract handling.
patches.mismatch: The optimized inference path lived as external scripts/logs and was not exposed through the bridge worker contract.

patches.mechanism: Inject FLAX_WEIGHTS_NAME = flax_model.msgpack before importing the affected upstream module.
patches.mismatch: Diffusers imports transformers.utils.FLAX_WEIGHTS_NAME after newer Transformers moved or removed that export.

patches.mechanism: Provide a scoped bridge-owned flash_attn.flash_attn_interface.flash_attn_varlen_func shim backed by torch scaled_dot_product_attention when native flash-attn is absent.
patches.mismatch: HunyuanVideo-Avatar hard-imports flash_attn_varlen_func in models_audio.py and parallel_states.py; ai now has native flash_attn, while the bridge keeps an SDPA shim for debug/import paths when native flash-attn is absent.

patches.mechanism: Patch or adapt model_index metadata to the upstream Diffusers class before constructing the pipeline.
patches.mismatch: Local snapshots advertise stale Cosmos3OmniDiffusersPipeline while installed Diffusers exposes Cosmos3OmniPipeline.

patches.mechanism: Alias pruning helpers from transformers.pytorch_utils onto transformers.modeling_utils before remote-code import.
patches.mismatch: Remote code imports find_pruneable_heads_and_indices and prune_linear_layer from transformers.modeling_utils, but modern Transformers exposes them from transformers.pytorch_utils.

patches.mechanism: Install a bridge-owned nemo.collections.asr.models.rnnt_bpe_models_prompt module that provides the missing non-hybrid EncDecRNNTBPEModelWithPrompt class on top of current NeMo EncDecRNNTBPEModel, preserving prompt_kernel weights and avoiding the installed hybrid CTC prompt class.
patches.mismatch: Nemotron 3.5 ASR archive targets rnnt_bpe_models_prompt.EncDecRNNTBPEModelWithPrompt from NeMo 2.8.0rc0, but NeMo Toolkit 2.7.3 in ai lacks that module; the installed hybrid prompt class is not state-dict compatible because the archive has prompt_kernel keys and no CTC decoder keys.

patches.mechanism: For synthetic smoke requests, call generate with min_length=0 while preserving the caller-requested max_new_tokens.
patches.mismatch: Legacy BART summarization generation configs can carry min_length values that exceed a bounded bridge smoke using max_new_tokens.

patches.mechanism: Load HuBERT encoder smokes with AutoFeatureExtractor and AutoModel instead of requiring tokenizer assets.
patches.mismatch: Legacy HuBERT configs advertise Wav2Vec2CTCTokenizer, but local encoder-only artifacts lack tokenizer vocab files.

patches.mechanism: Cast floating synthetic tensors to the loaded model parameter dtype while leaving integer/token tensors unchanged.
patches.mismatch: Latest-env fp16 model loads can receive fp32 synthetic inputs from processors, causing input/weight dtype mismatch.

patches.mechanism: Route DINOv2 through AutoImageProcessor plus AutoModel and a zero pixel_values bridge smoke.
patches.mismatch: DINOv2 artifacts use BitImageProcessor and should not be loaded through old audio/text processor assumptions.

patches.mechanism: Use AutoProcessor plus MusicgenForConditionalGeneration in the latest ai env and constrain bridge smokes with max_new_tokens.
patches.mismatch: MusicGen snapshots reference older/dev Transformers examples, but current Transformers can load them through the MusicgenForConditionalGeneration contract with bounded generation.

patches.mechanism: Load the vendored BigVGAN source from the artifact directory with use_cuda_kernel=False and run the pure PyTorch alias_free_activation path.
patches.mismatch: BigVGAN v2 can build an optional alias-free activation CUDA extension with nvcc/ninja, but the bridge should not require native compilation for latest-env portability.

patches.mechanism: Rebuild TRELLIS.2 sparse geometry/native CUDA dependencies directly in ai after deleting the legacy trellis env.
patches.mismatch: TRELLIS.2 default runtime needs native nvdiffrast, cumesh, flex_gemm, and bundled o_voxel in ai; spconv and kaolin are optional legacy parity, not default flex_gemm blockers.

patches.mechanism: Build flash-attn 2.8.3.post1 from source inside ai against Torch 2.10.0+cu128 with CUDA 12.8 and Ampere sm80 kernels.
patches.mismatch: The py311build flash-attn wheel was ABI-bound to its Torch/CUDA stack and failed when reused from ai.

patches.mechanism: Probe each TRELLIS.2 native dependency and exact runtime submodule before generation, including build order and source/import-site notes.
patches.mismatch: TRELLIS.2 native stack has mixed wheel, Torch/CUDA extension, source CUDA extension, and repo-bundled extension requirements that cannot be represented by parent imports alone.

patches.mechanism: Preload /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libstdc++.so.6 for TRELLIS ai worker/preflight commands so CuMesh extensions can resolve GLIBCXX_3.4.30 even if optional Open3D has been imported.
patches.mismatch: CuMesh built with system GCC requires GLIBCXX_3.4.30, while ai conda libstdc++ only exposes GLIBCXX_3.4.29.

patches.mechanism: Build bundled TRELLIS.2/o-voxel from a temporary source copy whose setup.py includes the valid Eigen headers cloned with CuMesh.
patches.mismatch: Bundled o-voxel third_party/eigen path did not contain Eigen/Dense, causing the first ai build to fail before CUDA compilation.

patches.mechanism: Patch Torch _MeshLayout shape/stride properties to derive from old axes/sizes state and install _FlatLayout alias before shard load.
patches.mismatch: Legacy FSDP2 shard pickles restore sizes/strides state while Torch 2.10 _MeshLayout expects shape/stride properties.

patches.mechanism: Remap matching FP8 linear state-dict keys before set_model_state_dict for rank-local FSDP2 shard loading.
patches.mismatch: Legacy FP8 FSDP2 shards save linear.weight plus linear.fp8_scale while current split holder modules expect fp8_weight_holder.weight and fp8_weight_holder.scale.

patches.mechanism: Install a read-only LlamaModel.model property returning self before Hunyuan text encoder construction.
patches.mismatch: Newer Transformers can expose LlavaForConditionalGeneration.language_model as LlamaModel, while Hunyuan code expects language_model.model.norm.

patches.mechanism: Set CPU_OFFLOAD=1 in the worker subprocess env and bridge wrapper before importing hymm_sp modules.
patches.mismatch: Legacy Hunyuan modules read CPU_OFFLOAD at import time, so passing only --cpu-offload leaves old module globals at 0.

patches.mechanism: Auto precision selects FP8/FSDP2 only on SM90+, otherwise routes to BF16 FSDP shards while keeping native flash-attn and INT8 LLaVA.
patches.mismatch: RTX 3090 SM86 cannot run NCCL FP8 collectives; FP8 reduction support starts on SM90-capable devices.

patches.mechanism: Run transformer_10 cache_hunyuan_avatar_vae_latents.py as a worker prewarm phase before torchrun constructs distributed FSDP shards.
patches.mismatch: On cache miss, VAE reference encode overlaps with loaded BF16 FSDP transformer shards and can OOM 24 GiB GPUs.

patches.mechanism: Default reference-frame cache materialization to max(sample_n_frames, 65), with explicit reference_frames override for larger windows.
patches.mismatch: Short 33-frame Avatar requests can generate 9-slot reference VAE caches, but the denoiser window expects a 17-slot reference-conditioning layout.

patches.mechanism: Dispatch MusicGen generation loading to MusicgenMelodyForConditionalGeneration when config.model_type is musicgen_melody.
patches.mismatch: musicgen_melody configs declare MusicgenMelodyForConditionalGeneration and should not load through the plain MusicgenForConditionalGeneration class.

patches.mechanism: Detect state_dict.bin plus compression_state_dict.bin, inspect embedded xp.cfg and best_state key prefixes, and optionally probe a local AudioCraft source checkout to report exact latest-env import blockers without requiring the legacy environment.
patches.mismatch: audiogen-medium ships AudioCraft solver checkpoint pairs with best_state/xp.cfg instead of a Transformers config.json directory.

patches.mechanism: Use DAM-3B-Self-Contained llava_llama.py as the runtime source for local DAM artifacts, manually load mm_projector/context_provider with the parent LlavaLlamaConfig, verify self-contained AutoModel eager load, and run the legacy DescribeAnythingModel wrapper for a bounded image/mask description in ai.
patches.mismatch: DAM component folders are split artifacts; projector and context provider need parent LlavaLlamaConfig, while generic AutoModel construction eagerly assembles the full LLM before the bridge can control placement.

patches.mechanism: Use ONNX Runtime CPU in the latest ai env, derive Audio2Face v2.3 audio/emotion input shapes from network_info.json, and summarize the 301-wide geometry output into skin, tongue, jaw, and eye partitions from sidecars.
patches.mismatch: Audio2Face artifacts point SDK/TensorRT configs at network.trt and include an empty config.json, while the portable local artifact is network.onnx plus JSON/NPZ sidecars that define preprocessing and output semantics.

patches.mechanism: Keep MobileLLM-125M and MobileLLM-125M-layer-share as separate default matrix entries and test against accidental string literal concatenation.
patches.mismatch: The classic MobileLLM smoke matrix had adjacent string literals without a comma, producing a fused nonexistent model id and skipping two older artifacts in fresh default runs.

patches.mechanism: Restore parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3 through the hardened NeMo ASR worker in ai with map_location=cpu then move to CUDA for load-only validation.
patches.mismatch: Older .nemo archives need target import checks and worker-owned restore so callers do not switch into a separate nemo_speech environment.

patches.mechanism: When a legacy Parakeet unified archive uses ConformerEncoder att_context_style=chunked_limited_with_rc, remove obsolete att_chunk_context_size/conv_context_style keys and translate to modern chunked_limited with the maximum archived right context.
patches.mismatch: parakeet-unified-en-0.6b stores old streaming context fields that modern NeMo ConformerEncoder no longer accepts.

patches.mechanism: After restore, default missing model.cfg.validation_ds to an empty mapping so modern RNNT transcribe can read use_start_end_token safely.
patches.mismatch: parakeet-unified-en-0.6b restores with validation_ds=null, but modern NeMo RNNT transcribe expects validation_ds.get(...).

patches.mechanism: Resolve ordinary model ids to the newest local Hugging Face cache snapshot under /data/huggingface/hub/models--*/snapshots before declaring a model missing.
patches.mismatch: Cached Hugging Face models are stored by snapshot hash instead of directly under the model id expected by legacy scripts.
patches.model_family: GPT-2 and BERT Hugging Face cache artifacts

patches.mechanism: Prefer the latest Transformers from_pretrained(dtype=...) keyword and fall back to torch_dtype=... only for older loaders.
patches.mismatch: Latest Transformers deprecates torch_dtype while old bridge code still needed a dtype-aware load path for fp16 encoder smokes.

patches.mechanism: Route GPT-2 artifacts through AutoTokenizer and AutoModelForCausalLM with deterministic bounded generate and eos-as-pad fallback.
patches.mismatch: GPT-2 tokenizers usually have no pad token, while latest generate warns or fails for padded generation paths unless pad_token_id is explicit.

patches.mechanism: Infer BERT encoder, masked-LM, and sequence-classification tasks from architecture metadata and route them through the matching AutoModel class.
patches.mismatch: Legacy BERT-family artifacts are not all plain encoders; classifier heads need AutoModelForSequenceClassification and masked-LM heads need AutoModelForMaskedLM.
